mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Estate Receivership Of Lettie S. Burwell Puckett
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Estate Receivership Of Lettie S. Burwell Puckett John E. Puckett, Appointed Receiver of his Wife's Estate before she reached 21 years of age 06.05.1900 Recorded in Will Book 1, page 220, in the Floyd County Courthouse.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
